'''ZZ-4Z''', also known as "'''ZeeZee'''," was a [[JV-Z1/D butler droid|JV-Z1/D]] [[Butler droid/Legends|butler droid]] produced by [[Serv-O-Droid, Inc./Legends|Serv-O-Droid, Inc.]] in the centuries prior to the formation of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
ZZ-4Z was a [[JV-Z1/D butler droid]] manufactured by [[Serv-O-Droid, Inc./Legends|Serv-O-Droid]] at the height of popularity for [[Butler droid/Legends|butler droids]] among the wealthy of [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] society.<ref name="DESB" /> Like all JV-Z1/Ds, ZZ-4Z was equipped with all the necessary tools and information to serve his master and cater to their whims.<ref name="EGTD" />

ZZ-4Z came into the possession of an eccentric owner who eventually willed the droid to the [[Carida Academy/Legends|Carida Academy]] "in the hopes that the [[Dean/Legends|Deans]] may never forget the civility which all citizens must hold dear." In his new role, ZZ-4Z was programmed to act as the private [[Secretary/Legends|secretary]], [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]],<ref name="DESB" /> and [[valet]]<ref name="EGTD" /> for the Academy's Dean and their [[Dean's Residence|residence]].<ref name="DESB" /> Working mainly at the administrative annex at Cliffside,<ref name="EGTD" /> the droid served under at least seventeen successive Deans, learning all of their peculiar quirks and habits. The Academy's [[Cadet/Legends|cadets]] were fond of ZZ-4Z, and they loved hearing the droid reveal each Dean's foibles as amusing and embarrassing anecdotes.<ref name="DESB" />

Dean [[Horace Wyrmyr]] eventually took over the Academy, and he did not like droids. He released ZZ-4Z from his service and constantly sent the droid on pointless errands. The droid wanted nothing more than to serve the Dean and make life easier for him. During the early years of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], ZZ-4Z met the [[Human/Legends|Human]] cadet [[Mako Spince]] at the Academy and found himself making a new friend. Spince was very interested in Dean Wyrmyr, and ZZ-4Z had access to all of the Dean's secrets as his majordomo. ZZ-4Z supplied Spince with the control codes to the Academy's physics lab, allowing the cadet to steal a [[gram]] of [[antimatter]] which he used for his "final" prank; accidentally destroying the [[Mascot Moon]] rather than simply blasting the [[Academy Seal]] from the surface.<ref name="DESB" />

[[File:ZZ-4Z.jpg|thumb|right|250px|ZZ-4Z]]
Spince was expelled for the prank, and once ZZ-4Z's involvement in the incident was discovered, Dean Wyrmyr angrily sent the droid to the recycling plants. The droid was rescued by Spince as a final gesture as he left the Academy.<ref name="DESB" /> Spince took ZZ-4Z with him to the [[Nar Shaddaa's Undercity|Undercity]] on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]].<ref name="EGTD" /> Now in Spince's service, ZZ-4Z attempted to serve his new master in the same way.<ref name="DESB" /> However, the squalor and filth of his new surroundings began to push the droid past his redline limit.<ref name="EGTD" /> The droid's constant bantering grew to annoy Spince and he intentionally lost ZZ-4Z in a [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] game.<ref name="DESB" />

ZZ-4Z's new owner was the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. Taking the droid to his [[Han Solo's apartment|apartment]], Solo's first orders to the droid were simply "I dunno, just leave it all … just like this." Obediently, ZZ-4Z followed Solo's orders and attempted to keep the residence exactly as he found it. As part of that, ZZ-4Z ended up gluing [[Clothing/Legends|socks]] to the floor leading Solo to complain about the droid's attempts to stop him reusing them. Eventually, the pair worked things out and the droid bought Solo a whole new wardrobe.<ref name="DESB" />

Eventually, Solo was forced to leave Nar Shaddaa in a hurry, with no time to tie up loose ends. In the rush, ZZ-4Z was forgotten. In Solo's absence, the droid continued to follow its programming and noted several visits by a [[Boba Fett/Legends|Mr. Fett]] who often checked up on the apartment.<ref name="DESB" /> ZZ-4Z was left alone for over a [[Standard decade/Legends|decade]]. Approximately [[10 ABY/Legends|six years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Solo returned to Nar Shaddaa with his wife, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]]. Upon entering his old apartment, he encountered ZZ-4Z, still attempting to carry out his assignment, who informed him that a "Mr. Fett" was waiting to see him.<ref name="EGTD" />

Solo attempted to leave, but Fett arrived and a [[lightfight]] ensued. In the confrontation, ZZ-4Z was destroyed in the crossfire. While Solo did not return to repair the droid, his wife did comment that having such a droid around the house would not hurt, and ZZ-4Z would probably get along with [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]].<ref name="DESB" />

==Equipment==
Like all JV-Z1 droids, ZZ-4Z was well equipped with all the necessary hardware to carry out its primary function, such as carrying out domestic duties or supervising other household droids. ZZ-4Z was equipped with an [[infrared lintscope]], a [[Vocabulator/Legends|vocabulator]] that gave the droid a mild-mannered and subservient sounding voice, and etiquette programming.<ref name="FF36" />
